########################
######  Bandit  ########
########################
bandit==1.9.4

########################
#######  MyPy  #########
########################
mypy>=2.1.0
mypy-extensions>=1.1.0
# Exact pins, kept in sync with `src/python/pyproject.toml` by
# `src/python/tests/meta_tests/test_resolve_version_consistency.py` — the `pydantic.mypy` plugin should
# match the pydantic the app runs with, and the test suite's FastAPI must match the app's. Pants can't
# single-source these across resolves (parametrize is unsupported on `python_requirements` overrides), so
# the test enforces the pins stay equal. `fastapi[standard]` here (vs. plain `fastapi` in the app deps)
# adds the test/tool extras (uvicorn, httpx, ...); only the version is required to match.
pydantic==2.13.4

##########################
########  Pytest  ########
##########################
fastapi[standard]==0.138.0  # for FastAPI testing utilities
pytest>=9.1.1
pytest-socket>=0.8.0
pytest-xdist>=3.8.0
ruamel-yaml>=0.19.1
tomlkit

################################################################
########  MkDocs + GitHub Pages site docs requirements  ########
################################################################
mkdocs>=1.6.1
mkdocs-material>=9.7.6
mkdocstrings[python]>=1.0.4
# Renders the app's OpenAPI spec inline on the REST API docs page (the `[OAD(...)]` directive). See
# docs/usage/rest-api.md; the spec is generated to docs/openapi.json by the `docs:openapi` target.
neoteroi-mkdocs>=1.1.0
